common.name: Origin Spark
common.text: Gain 1 random Origin feat.

common.name: Wandering Training
common.text: Gain +1 to one random ability score.

common.name: Potion Belt
common.text: Gain 2 healing potions.

uncommon.name: Heroic Trick
uncommon.text: Gain 1 random feat.

uncommon.name: Sudden Growth
uncommon.text: Gain +2 to one random ability score.

uncommon.name: Minor Treasure
uncommon.text: Gain 1 random common magic item.

uncommon.name: Potion Stockpile
uncommon.text: Gain 3 healing potions or 1 greater healing potion.

uncommon.name: Battle Ready
uncommon.text: At the start of each combat, gain temporary HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

rare.name: Twin Talents
rare.text: Gain 2 random feats.

rare.name: Double Growth
rare.text: Gain +2 to one random ability score twice. Roll separately each time.

rare.name: Last Stand
rare.text: Once per Long Rest, when you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead.

rare.name: Greater Treasure
rare.text: Gain 1 random uncommon magic item.

legendary.name: Heroic Relic
legendary.text: Gain 1 random rare magic item.

legendary.name: Perfected Form
legendary.text: Gain +2 to one random ability score three times. Roll separately each time.

legendary.name: Surge of Fate
legendary.text: Once, take one additional action on your turn.

common.name: Battle Rhythm
common.text: Once per combat, gain Advantage on an attack after an ally hits the same target.

common.name: Improved Vitality
common.text: Increase your maximum HP by 6.

uncommon.name: Subclass Technique
uncommon.text: Gain a core subclass upgrade appropriate to your chosen subclass.

uncommon.name: Potent Mana
uncommon.text: Gain 2 max Mana.

rare.name: Divine Smite Style
rare.text: Once per combat, add a burst of radiant or class-appropriate damage to a hit.

rare.name: Action Surge Style
rare.text: Once per Short Rest, take one extra action on your turn.

legendary.name: Aura Core
legendary.text: You and nearby allies gain a powerful defensive aura scaled for Floor 2.

common.name: Veteran Reflex
common.text: Once per combat, reroll a failed saving throw and use the new result.

common.name: Greater Vitality
common.text: Increase your maximum HP by 10.

uncommon.name: Major Spell Power
uncommon.text: Gain a high-impact spell reward appropriate to Floor 3.

uncommon.name: Greater Subclass Upgrade
uncommon.text: Gain a strong subclass upgrade or expand an existing subclass feature.

rare.name: Extra Attack Upgrade
rare.text: Improve your attack routine with an additional attack or equivalent class-scaled effect.

rare.name: Expanded Aura
rare.text: Your aura-style rewards grow stronger or affect a wider area.

legendary.name: Build Breaker
legendary.text: Gain a powerful endgame effect that changes how your build plays.

rare.name: Final Ascension
rare.text: Gain a major capstone-style feature for the final battles.

rare.name: Mythic Relic
rare.text: Gain a relic with a powerful combat-defining effect.

legendary.name: Legendary Relic
legendary.text: Gain a legendary relic with a build-defining or encounter-breaking effect.

legendary.name: Endgame Apotheosis
legendary.text: Gain a final reward that pushes your character beyond normal class limits.

common.name: Reckless Momentum
common.text: Once per combat, after you hit with a melee attack, gain temporary HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

common.name: Weapon Mastery
common.text: Choose two Simple or Martial melee weapons. You can use their Weapon Mastery properties. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you may change one of these weapon choices.

common.name: Danger Sense
common.text: You have Advantage on Dexterity saving throws unless you have the Incapacitated condition.

common.name: Reckless Attack
common.text: When you make your first attack roll on your turn, you may attack recklessly. Until the start of your next turn, your attack rolls using Strength have Advantage, but attack rolls against you also have Advantage.

common.name: Primal Knowledge
common.text: Choose one skill: Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, or Survival. You gain proficiency in that skill. While raging, you may use Strength for checks with that skill.

common.name: Battle Roar
common.text: When you enter Rage, gain Temporary HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus + your CON modifier.

uncommon.name: Iron Hide
uncommon.text: While you are using Unarmored Defense, reduce bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage you take by 1.

uncommon.name: Ferocious Recovery
uncommon.text: Once per combat while raging, when you start your turn above 0 HP and below half your hit points, regain hit points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

uncommon.name: Fast Movement
uncommon.text: Your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing Heavy armor.

rare.name: Extra Attack
rare.text: When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can make two attacks instead of one.

rare.name: Greater Rage
rare.text: While raging, your Rage damage bonus increases by +1.

rare.name: Feral Instinct
rare.text: You have Advantage on Initiative rolls. If you enter combat while conscious, you may enter Rage before the first turn begins.

rare.name: Titan Grip
rare.text: While raging, you count as one size larger for Grapple, Shove, carrying capacity, and moving creatures you are grappling. In addition, your melee attacks deal +1 damage to creatures you are grappling.

legendary.name: Brutal Strike
legendary.text: If you use Reckless Attack, you can forgo any Advantage on one Strength-based attack roll of your choice on your turn. The chosen attack roll mustn't have Disadvantage. If the chosen attack roll hits, the target takes an extra 1d10 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon or Unarmed Strike, and you can cause one Brutal Strike effect of your choice. You have the following effect options. Forceful Blow. The target is pushed 15 feet straight away from you. You can then move up to half your Speed straight toward the target without provoking Opportunity Attacks. Hamstring Blow. The target's Speed is reduced by 15 feet until the start of your next turn. A target can be affected by only one Hamstring Blow at a time - the most recent one.

legendary.name: Spirit-Breaker Rage
legendary.text: While your Rage is active, you have Resistance to Force, Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage.

common.name: Inspiring Recovery
common.text: When a creature uses your Bardic Inspiration die and succeeds on the roll, that creature regains hit points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

common.name: Jack of All Trades
common.text: You add half your Proficiency Bonus, rounded down, to any ability check you make that does not already include your Proficiency Bonus. Expertise. You gain Expertise in two of your skill proficiencies of your choice.

common.name: Vicious Mockery
common.text: You learn Vicious Mockery. When a creature fails its saving throw against it, it has Disadvantage on all attack rolls it makes before the end of its next turn.

common.name: Arcane Growth
common.text: Gain 1 random cantrip from your class spell list.

uncommon.name: Deepened Magic
uncommon.text: Gain 1 random level 1 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 1 max Mana.

rare.name: Greater Spellcraft
rare.text: Gain 1 random level 2 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 2 max Mana.

legendary.name: Breakthrough Spell
legendary.text: Gain 1 random level 4 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 4 max Mana.

veryRare.name: High Spellcraft
veryRare.text: Gain 1 random level 3 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 3 max Mana.

common.name: Minor Benediction
common.text: Once per combat, when you heal a creature, it gains +1 to its next saving throw.

common.name: Arcane Growth
common.text: Gain 1 random cantrip from your class spell list.

uncommon.name: Deepened Magic
uncommon.text: Gain 1 random level 1 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 1 max Mana.

uncommon.name: Radiant Rebuke
uncommon.text: Once per combat, when a creature hits you, deal Radiant damage equal to your WIS modifier.

rare.name: Greater Spellcraft
rare.text: Gain 1 random level 2 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 2 max Mana.

rare.name: Channel Spark
rare.text: Gain one small Channel Divinity-style effect appropriate to your divine path.

legendary.name: Breakthrough Spell
legendary.text: Gain 1 random level 4 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 4 max Mana.

legendary.name: Blessed Intervention
legendary.text: Once per Long Rest, reroll a failed death saving throw or failed save against a curse.

veryRare.name: High Spellcraft
veryRare.text: Gain 1 random level 3 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 3 max Mana.

common.name: Verdant Step
common.text: Once per combat, ignore difficult terrain until the end of your turn.

common.text: Gain 1 random cantrip from your class spell list.

uncommon.name: Deepened Magic
uncommon.text: Gain 1 random level 1 spell from your class spell list. You also gain 1 max Mana.
